evals.prompt: Create a technical specification for a URL shortener service. It should handle creating short URLs, redirecting to original URLs, tracking click analytics, and supporting custom short codes. Make it production-ready with considerations for rate limiting, analytics, and data storage.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive Markdown spec with sections for problem statement, goals/non-goals, system overview, domain model, API contracts, configuration, security, and observability

evals.prompt: I need a specification template for a REST API project. Can you generate the skeleton structure so I can fill in the details?
evals.expected_output: A Markdown file with section headers and TODO placeholders for a REST API spec, ready to be filled in

evals.prompt: Write a full technical spec for a real-time collaborative text editor like Google Docs. Include how the conflict resolution works (CRDT), user authentication, document persistence, and the WebSocket protocol for syncing changes.
evals.expected_output: A detailed spec covering all the mentioned components plus additional sections like failure model, security considerations, and scalability
